rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF WAYNE RUSSEL WILLIAMS
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: continued to July 15, 2015. Declaration in response to Examiner's notes not verified by petitioners as requested in the notes. exception allowing attorney to verify on behalf of clients does not apply when clients are fiduciaries appointed in the proceeding. defect must be cured (see LR 14.18) no later than Friday, July 10, 2015 to avoid a further continuance.
